allow: Bash(python -c "from backend.app.main import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('OK'\); print\(sorted\(r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'path'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -m pytest backend/tests/test_schemas.py backend/tests/test_drift.py backend/tests/test_recommender.py backend/tests/test_api_auth.py --no-cov -q)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec api ls /app/reports/figures)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec api pwd)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec api curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:8000/api/v1/monitoring/evaluation/figures/calibration_pre.png)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec api /opt/venv/bin/python -m backend.app.ml.train run --train data/processed/train.parquet --val data/processed/val.parquet --models-out /tmp/staging)
